summary: Iteration 13: Successfully tested P0 and P1 features - Category Tree Structure and 'Neuer Artikel hier' Button. All 11 backend tests and 14 frontend tests passed.
seed_data_creation: Test data prefixed with TEST_iter13_ was created and cleaned up during tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested features verified working: 1) Category tree with hierarchical parent-child relationships on Articles page, 2) Collapsible/expandable category folders, 3) 'Neuer Artikel hier' button appears when category selected and navigates to editor with preselected category, 4) ArticleEditor shows category tree with multi-select checkboxes, 5) Articles filter correctly by category_ids.

P0_category_tree_articles_page.notes: Hierarchical category tree displayed on Wissensartikel page with collapsible folders, parent-child relationships visible

P0_category_tree_editor.notes: ArticleEditor shows category tree with multi-select checkboxes for assigning multiple categories to articles

P1_new_article_here_button.notes: Button appears when any category is selected, labeled 'Neuer Artikel hier'

P1_preselected_category.notes: Clicking 'Neuer Artikel hier' navigates to /articles/new?category={id} with category pre-selected

multi_category_filtering.notes: Articles with category_ids array are correctly filtered when selecting categories

login_system.notes: Cookie-based JWT authentication working with admin credentials

api_tests_performed.categories_get: GET /api/categories - Returns hierarchical category list with parent_id
api_tests_performed.articles_get: GET /api/articles - Returns articles with category_ids array
api_tests_performed.articles_create_multi_category: POST /api/articles - Creates article with multiple category_ids
api_tests_performed.tags_get: GET /api/tags - Returns unique tags from articles

ui_tests_performed.login: Admin login via UI works correctly
ui_tests_performed.dashboard: Dashboard loads with stats and navigation
ui_tests_performed.articles_page_category_tree: Category tree sidebar with expandable folders
ui_tests_performed.new_article_here_navigation: Button navigates to editor with ?category= param
ui_tests_performed.editor_category_tree: Hierarchical tree with checkboxes in editor
ui_tests_performed.editor_preselected: Category from URL parameter is pre-selected
